headline: American Airlines Stock to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: AAL's Q1 earnings are likely to benefit from a record revenue growth outlook above 10%, but rising fuel and labor costs threaten its bottom line.

raw.headline: American Airlines Stock to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
raw.summary: AAL's Q1 earnings are likely to benefit from a record revenue growth outlook above 10%, but rising fuel and labor costs threaten its bottom line.

headline: Union Pacific (UNP) Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Union Pacific (UNP), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.

raw.headline: Union Pacific (UNP) Q1 Earnings on the Horizon: Analysts' Insights on Key Performance Measures
raw.summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Union Pacific (UNP), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Union Pacific settles dispute with rail supplier, reaches 7-year agreement
summary: Rocky Mountain Steel plans to operate a new, long-rail mill in Pueblo, Colorado, this year as part of a $1 billion investment in domestic steel production.

raw.headline: Union Pacific settles dispute with rail supplier, reaches 7-year agreement
raw.summary: Rocky Mountain Steel plans to operate a new, long-rail mill in Pueblo, Colorado, this year as part of a $1 billion investment in domestic steel production.

headline: The Morning Call Sheet: Markets steady as earnings and geopolitics collide
summary: Hightower’s Stephanie Link, Miller Tabak’s Matt Maley and Veda Partners’ Henrietta Treyz says resilient consumers and earnings offset geopolitical risks, though volatility and policy uncertainty remain key.

raw.headline: The Morning Call Sheet: Markets steady as earnings and geopolitics collide
raw.summary: Hightower’s Stephanie Link, Miller Tabak’s Matt Maley and Veda Partners’ Henrietta Treyz says resilient consumers and earnings offset geopolitical risks, though volatility and policy uncertainty remain key.
